overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Legend of Zelda showing the protagonist Link running through a sunlit grassy meadow, climbing a rocky outcrop, and reaching a cliff edge overlooking a vast canyon with turquoise water below. The scene features golden hour lighting with warm tones and showcases the game's expansive natural environment with distant mountain ranges and ancient structures visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland meadow with mountain backdrop

events.description: character slows from running to walking as terrain begins sloping upward toward rocky outcrop

agents.ego_description: Link runs steadily through tall grass along a dirt path toward a rocky outcrop in the distance

entered.detail: lush green grass swaying in the wind covering the ground
narrow worn trail cutting through the tall grass
large stone formation rising ahead in the meadow
cluster of evergreen trees on the left horizon
hazy mountain range silhouetted against the bright sky

segments.scene_description: Link runs through a sunlit meadow of tall green grass, following a dirt path toward a large rocky outcrop ahead. Pine forests line the left horizon while distant mountains rise in the background under a clear golden hour sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky slope leading to cliff edge

events.description: terrain transitions from grassy meadow to rocky cliff face as character begins climbing
canyon with turquoise water becomes visible as character reaches the cliff edge

agents.ego_description: Link climbs up the steep rocky slope using hands and feet to reach the summit

entered.detail: turquoise river visible deep in the canyon below
sheer rock faces dropping down to the water

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts to bare rock as Link climbs the steep cliff face. The grassy meadow falls away behind him, revealing a breathtaking view of a deep canyon with turquoise water and sheer rock walls on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff summit overlooking vast canyon system

events.description: character stops moving and stands still at the cliff edge to observe the view
camera pans right to reveal ancient tower structure in the distant canyon

agents.ego_description: Link stands at the cliff edge looking out over the vast canyon as the camera pans to showcase the panoramic view

entered.detail: tall stone tower with glowing elements visible in the distant canyon

segments.scene_description: Standing atop the rocky summit, Link overlooks the vast canyon system with turquoise waters below. The camera pans across the landscape, revealing distant mountain ranges and an ancient tower structure emerging from the mist in the far distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a lush, sunlit meadow into a sweeping panoramic view from a high rocky summit. It begins with Link running along a dirt path through tall green grass, with pine forests and distant mountains framing the horizon under a golden hour sky. As the terrain shifts to bare rock, the camera ascends the steep cliff face, causing the meadow to fall away and revealing a deep canyon with turquoise water and sheer walls. The scene then opens fully upon reaching the summit, where the camera pans across the vast canyon system. Finally, the view expands to encompass distant mountain ranges and an ancient tower structure emerging from the far-off mist.
